─Context─

Context

This is the Lore HQ instance — the central hub for the Lore framework’s development, documentation, and operations.

Project Identity

  • Purpose: A persistent memory layer for AI coding agents.
  • Goals: Cross-platform knowledge sync, automated snag capture, and behavioral rule enforcement.
  • Values: Security-first, operator-in-the-loop, platform-agnostic.

Operator Profile

See Operator Profile for personal preferences and local machine context.
